creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rick Macklem from comment #11)
fuse_vnop_read or fuse_vnop_write might return EINTR if:
* uiomove(9) returns ERESTART or EINTR
* getblk returns NULL
* bwrite returns EINTR
* If a signal is received while waiting for the daemon to respond, the syscall is not restartable, and the daemon supports FUSE_INTERRUPT.

It would be helpful to see ktrace output, as markj said.  It would also be helpful to see sshfs's output when run with "-d".
